name: Genusswerk Schall Fruit Secco non-alcoholic
description: More information about Genusswerk Schall Fruit Secco non-alcoholic Our non-alcoholic fruit secco is a refreshingly fruity composition of local fruit with a subtle ginger spiciness. Enjoy it as an aperitif at celebrations or give it away as a tingling treat. We recommend a drinking temperature of 7-9°C.

name: Arduenna No Alcohol - Gin alternative
description: More information about Arduenna No Alcohol No alcohol, pure enjoyment. Because enjoying an extraordinary moment should never require compromise, Arduenna No Alcohol was created: a gin-inspired non-alcoholic drink that offers a new way to experience the moment with intensity and elegance.Arduenna No Alcohol is not an alternative, but an experience in itself. The Arduenna moment does not end with the first glass, it begins with a ritual.Served with tonic or mocktail, Arduenna No Alcohol transforms a simple moment into a unique experience, where every sip reveals the perfect balance of complexity and sophistication.

name: 3x GNISTA Barreled Oak - Alcohol-free whisky alternative
description: More information about 3x GNISTA Barreled Oak The GNISTA Barreled Oak non-alcoholic whisky alternative is a true original. The non-alcoholic drink delights with a woody, smoky taste - just like real whisky. Only without the revolutions. What does the GNISTA Barreled Oak non-alcoholic whisky alternative taste like? The non-alcoholic whisky alternative tastes wonderfully dry and smoky and has spicy notes and rye aromas. There is also a distinct character of oak barrels. The drink does not taste of alcohol. What is GNISTA Barreled Oak non-alcoholic whisky alternative made from? Rhubarb juice is used to make the non-alcoholic whisky alternative, which is refined with dried spices, oak and raisins. How do you use GNISTA Barreled Oak non-alcoholic whisky alternative? GNISTA Barreled Oak can be used like any smoky spirit: neat on the rocks, with a splash of soda or as a base for non-alcoholic cocktails. How many bottles are included in the package? This package contains three bottles of GNISTA Barreled Oak non-alcoholic whisky alternative.

name: Zéro de Cologne - Alcohol-free gin alternative
description: More information about Zéro de Cologne Zéro de Cologne - it doesn't always have to be alcohol Is there such a thing as alcohol-free gin? The clear answer is: NO, there is no such thing as alcohol-free gin. According to the law, a gin must have at least 37.5% alcohol by volume. But it is possible to produce a drink that consists of the botanicals (ingredients) of a gin, just without alcohol. Due to popular demand, we have spent months developing two particularly interesting and naturally delicious products. Zéro de Cologne is the alcohol-free alternative for delicious long drinks with 0.0% alcohol by volume. Invented, created and produced by the makers of the multiple gold award-winning Gin de Cologne from Cologne. - without sugar - without artificial flavors - 0.0% alcohol by volume The taste of the classic with tonic is "limey, tangy and refreshing" and the rosé is "fruity, berry, tangy and refreshing". We attach great importance to top premium quality and are sure that you will enjoy Zéro de Cologne. The feedback from our customers is always "delicious" or "very delicious". We recommend a lively, sparkling and refreshing "Zéro & Tonic" as a drink. Recipe: 6 cl Zéro de Cologne 14 cl tonic water 3-4 ice cubes 1 piece of lime +++ Have fun & cheers +++ Acidifier: citric acid | preservative: potassium sorbate Best before: see imprint on bottle To be consumed within 8 weeks once opened and refrigerated.

name: Quarantini Virgin - non-alcoholic gin alternative
description: More information about Quarantini Virgin The Quarantini Virgin is a non-alcoholic alternative for anyone who doesn't want to or can't drink. For every one sold, one person in a developing country is supplied with drinking water for a year. Quarantini works together with Viva Con Aqua and builds water wells in Zambia to provide drinking water locally. Quarantini is not intended to be drunk neat, but only as a mixed drink. Thanks to a special distillation process, our non-alcoholic virgin has a particularly intense aroma and taste. The botanicals include papaya, bergamot and a hint of mint for a special freshness. The taste is further enhanced by angelica root, violet root, the well-known juniper and coriander seeds. Quarantini Virgin is free from sugar and sweeteners.

name: Dr. Jaglas Herber Hibiscus - non-alcoholic aperitif
description: More information about Dr. Jaglas Herber Hibiscus Dr. Jaglas Herber Hibiskus is a tart-sweet non-alcoholic aperitif. With a pleasant taste of hibiscus flowers, rosemary, bitter orange, elderberry and vanilla. This aperitif is not only recommended for its taste, but is also a real eye-catcher in the glass with its great color. Ideal for a refreshing hibiscus spritz. Pour three parts Dr. Jaglas Herber Hibiskus with one part high-quality tonic water and the juice of half a lime into a wine glass or tumbler. Stir and garnish with fresh berries or a sprig of rosemary. Serving suggestions: Can be kept for at least 8 weeks after opening

name: Dr. Jaglas San Limello - non-alcoholic limoncello
description: More information about Dr. Jaglas San Limello This non-alcoholic lemon aperitif is the non-alcoholic alternative to limoncello. It conjures up Italian dolce vita in your glass and a smile on your face. Developed by the Berlin pharmacy brand, this aperitif is designed to stand out, linger on the tongue and surprise - preferably as a spritz. An ode to the "sweet life" and joie de vivre. The fresh acidity of ripe lemons is balanced by intense notes of ginger, thyme, grapefruit, honey, cinnamon, fennel and chili. The citrus-yellow Limello is reminiscent of sunny hours in Sicily - at any time of year. Goes wonderfully with seafood, nuts and a handful of fruit. Perfect gifts for Easter and Christmas, especially for pregnant women, nursing mothers and baby showers.

name: Wind chime Libre
description: More information about Wind chime Libre Even pirates would have been delighted: the taste of Caribbean barrels, only alcohol-free. A few centuries later, the time has finally come: with Windspiel Libre, the Daun-based spirits manufacturer Windspiel from the Volcanic Eifel region, known for its innovations, is presenting an alternative for all those who don't want to miss out on the taste of the Caribbean on their tongue despite being "alcohol-free". A flavor composition of warm tones of black tea, elements of dried papaya, framed with a subtle note of wood flavors makes our Windspiel Libre a perfect partner for long drinks and cocktails with Caribbean flair. But Windspiel Libre is also a good choice as a base to reduce the alcohol content in mixed drinks.

description: More information about NONA Spritz NONA Spritz is an excellent non-alcoholic aperitif and combines the sunny freshness of blood oranges and orange peel with a hint of bitter gentian root. The aperitif was created in collaboration with top chefs and sommeliers and redefines refined non-alcoholic enjoyment. Perfectly balanced and versatile - NONA Spritz is the quintessence of non-alcoholic refreshment. The smaller, handy 20cl version of this exquisite drink is ideal for tasting or as a tasteful gift for special occasions. Nona Spritz is vegan, gluten-free, allergen-free and suitable for pregnant women.

description: More information about 3x GNISTA Floral Wormwood The GNISTA Floral Wormwood non-alcoholic aperitif brings the best Scandinavian quality to your glass - without any alcohol. What does the GNISTA Floral Wormwood non-alcoholic aperitif taste like? The alcohol-free aperitif first tastes aromatic and fresh. This is followed by pleasant bitter notes, wormwood and fresh herbs, with a hint of orange peel. The finish of this non-alcoholic drink is wonderfully floral. What is GNISTA Floral Wormwood Non-alcoholic Aperitif made from? Rhubarb, dried spices such as camomile, lovage and black pepper go into this non-alcoholic aperitif. name: ISH Spirits London Botanical - Alcohol-free gin alternative
description: More information about ISH Spirits London Botanical ISH London Botanical Spirit is a high-quality non-alcoholic gin alternative from Denmark. The product is based on the botanicals found in a classic juniper-accented London Dry Gin and offers an authentic non-alcoholic gin experience. The sun-dried juniper berries from Southern Europe, coriander seeds from Provence, peppercorns, bitter oranges and a unique distillate made from the peel of chili seeds provide the familiar London Dry Gin taste without alcohol. London Botanical Spirit is not intended to be drunk straight, but can be used as a wonderful base for alcohol-free versions of gin cocktails and long drinks such as gin & tonic. Simply mix one part ISH London Botanical Spirit with two parts tonic for the perfect balance. If you do want to drink alcohol, you can also use the product in combination with other spirits to reduce the alcohol content of your gin cocktails. Made from natural ingredients Has a low sugar content, making it the perfect choice for those watching their sugar and calorie intake

name: REBELS 0.0% Amaretto Alternative non-alcoholic
description: More information about REBELS 0.0% Amaretto Alternative non-alcoholic REBELS 0.0% Amaretto Alternative - this refreshing non-alcoholic alternative to Amaretto is perfect for those who love the taste of Amaretto but want to enjoy it without the hangover and effects of alcohol. With an almond and sweet apricot note, the Amaretto alternative is the ideal base for a variety of non-alcoholic drinks and cocktails. The typical sweet marzipan scent is harmoniously blended with the incomparable sweetness of vanilla and cherry, resulting in a classic creamy, nutty taste. The finish is slightly bitter, spicy and particularly long-lasting. Made in Switzerland. The perfect choice for a non-alcoholic version of an "Amaretto Sour": Simply add 5cl Amaretto Alternative, 3cl orange juice and 2cl lemon juice to a shaker, shake with ice and garnish with an orange slice.
